{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219572465FDB5549A81C363F2F5"}"},"total":561},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7433305764352852760","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，虽然刚开始写姜撞奶还有奶茶那些感觉像是硬凑的剧情，但后来写的真的很好，说无女主真的就无女主，比那些打脸装逼开后宫的强几万倍[飞吻]期待作者大大的下一本书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730707213,"group_id":"7311597574345985086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不要跟我杠，杠就是你对✓","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyN6sMQDyIbU2u7Jzpu7vOk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ea73f42e88c44057a0f85838738f770d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710500&x-signature=blU5LpKsbbmGcscEQpNIhx8MFFs%3D","user_id":"536196217322495","user_name":"小猫发动机"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"536196217322495","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748343530,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7311597574345985086","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食】【无CP】【日常】【温馨】【治愈】【下饭】
宽厚的手掌轻轻拍打着雪白的皮肤，一根根细密的绒毛滑过指尖与掌心，酥酥痒痒地触感让人沉醉不已，难以自拔。
抚摸，揉捏，拍打，皮肤漾开一圈圈涟漪，带着皮下柔软的肉一并颤动起来。
纤长地五指聚拢，依依不舍地最后掐了一把，掌心握住刀，轻柔又仔细地将绒毛剔除干净。
忽然，尖刀立起，向下用力一划，洁白柔软的肌肤顿时皮开肉绽，再向上一挑，登时骨肉分离，却没有一丝鲜血溢出。
齐禹沉醉于刀锋切开肌肉纤维的美妙触感，尖刀快速划过，挑断最后的硬筋，一根完整的腿骨被他取出，上边不带半分腿肉。
真是艺术品啊！
可惜，父亲的吼声打断了他的创作：“羊腿处理好没有！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4fd13a7989ddba873ad8c9d349588465~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"承沐","author_id":"","book_id":"7311597574345985086","book_name":"开间饭店：家有红案大宗师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7311597787764752958","read_count":"15182","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1213910"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"575","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食,无女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7fcc75ee1f41725b73fd1422ad851931~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364644&x-signature=fo0YvBmPgVhKBgEs6rQFiRA%2BT0U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3718228976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"632"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219572465FDB5549A81C363F2F5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"for
